name: lark
description: Codex plugin wrapper for official Lark/Feishu lark-cli skills.

interface.shortDescription: Calendar, Docs, Drive, Base, IM, Mail, Tasks, meetings, and approvals through lark-cli.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin that bundles the official Lark/Feishu skills for lark-cli. It keeps each product area's specialist workflow while exposing one plugin entry point for daily workspace automation.
defaultPrompt: Summarize today's Lark calendar, tasks, and meeting notes.
Find Lark docs and Base records for a project.
Draft a Lark message or email for review.
